privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic Moodle task that requires an agent to configure an assignment marking guide in the pre-existing HIST201 (World History) course. The task requires creating a marking guide named 'Research Paper Standard Guide' for the 'Industrial Revolution Research Paper' assignment with three criteria (Historical Argument: 40 pts, Critical Analysis: 40 pts, Turabian Formatting: 20 pts), each with specific marker descriptions and two frequently used comments. All metadata values have been verified against task files and Moodle documentation. The grading method 'guide' uses database status 20 for Ready state and 0 for Draft state. The verifier checks all configuration aspects with a 100-point scale and 70-point pass threshold.
